title: Obese Crops
description: Bigger crops, that bring a bountiful harvest!
body:
Obese Crops

🥕 Bigger crops, that bring a bountiful harvest! 🥕

This mod adds bigger versions of original crops, they will have a small chance of replace crops when they reach their fully grown stage! We also have scythes, which can be used a weapons, or as a mean to collect your crops and clear grass in your fields. --- ## Features - **Obese crops**: Bigger versions of obese crops that have a small chance of replacing full grown crops, the more water and light nearby the more chances it has of growing into an obese crop. ![Image displaying all three obese crops: the obese potato, obese carrot and obese beetroot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77c5ce4adcc84034b0a9e7a2eef85616588cff26.png) - **Scythes**: With the scythes, you can harvest your crops, chop your obese crops or till the ground with more ease, by default they will do their actions in a 3x3 area, but that can be increased with the bountiful reap enchantment. ![A player holding a netherite scythe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfd7353fe5b03a42c8b5909453f60f543e964770.webp) ![All the tiers of scythes in the mod: wooden, stone, iron, gold, diamond and netherite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56c9f9c508a924401c774cc9c8be3c4d93eb11c9.webp) - **Chopped crops**: With sharp tools like scythes, swords, axes and knives from other mods you can chop obese crops to get 2 to 4 small versions of the crop, this is usually more efficient than uncrafting them!! ![A player with a netherite scythe on its hand that was used to chop an obese block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b9befb246d16a3ff1f35ab4dcd8a1be4b8fcdc1.png) --- ## Support If you encounter any issues or have suggestions, feel free to: - Open an issue on GitHub. - Send me a DM on Discord @macuguita - You are free to use this mod in any Modpack in this platform --- ## Credits - Developer: macuguita - Artist: To0pa
